parameters-en.Drive: Controls the amount of fuzz applied to the signal.
parameters-en.Feedback: Controls the feedback of the built-in phaser.
parameters-en.Tone: Controls the overall tonal balance of the fuzz. Lower values are drastically filtered while higher values are more full range.
parameters-en.Rate: Controls the rate or speed of the built-in phaser.
parameters-en.Output: Sets the overall level of the block.
